'''竏喘-f-sh''' ('''kabafash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hip|hip]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-f-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hip|hip]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喘-f-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kabafash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibafash|thibafash]] || [[word:jibafash|jibafash]] || [[word:shibafash|shibafash]] || [[word:kibafash|kibafash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubafash|thuthubafash]] || [[word:jujubafash|jujubafash]] || [[word:shushubafash|shushubafash]] || [[word:kukubafash|kukubafash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubafash|thubafash]] || [[word:jubafash|jubafash]] || [[word:shubafash|shubafash]] || [[word:kubafash|kubafash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubafash|thubafash]] || [[word:jubafash|jubafash]] || [[word:shubafash|shubafash]] || [[word:kubafash|kubafash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebafash|thebafash]] || [[word:jebafash|jebafash]] || [[word:shebafash|shebafash]] || [[word:kebafash|kebafash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobafash|thothobafash]] || [[word:jojobafash|jojobafash]] || [[word:shoshobafash|shoshobafash]] || [[word:kokobafash|kokobafash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobafash|thobafash]] || [[word:jobafash|jobafash]] || [[word:shobafash|shobafash]] || [[word:kobafash|kobafash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobafash|thobafash]] || [[word:jobafash|jobafash]] || [[word:shobafash|shobafash]] || [[word:kobafash|kobafash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bafash|bafash]] || [[word:bafash|bafash]] || [[word:bafash|bafash]] || [[word:bafash|bafash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bafash|bafash]] || [[word:bafash|bafash]] || [[word:bafash|bafash]] || [[word:bafash|bafash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bafash|bafash]] || [[word:bafash|bafash]] || [[word:bafash|bafash]] || [[word:bafash|bafash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bafash|bafash]] || [[word:bafash|bafash]] || [[word:bafash|bafash]] || [[word:bafash|bafash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦbafash|thﾃｦbafash]] || [[word:jﾃｦbafash|jﾃｦbafash]] || [[word:shﾃｦbafash|shﾃｦbafash]] || [[word:kﾃｦbafash|kﾃｦbafash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabafash|thathabafash]] || [[word:jajabafash|jajabafash]] || [[word:shashabafash|shashabafash]] || [[word:kakabafash|kakabafash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabafash|thabafash]] || [[word:jabafash|jabafash]] || [[word:shabafash|shabafash]] || [[word:kabafash|kabafash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabafash|thabafash]] || [[word:jabafash|jabafash]] || [[word:shabafash|shabafash]] || [[word:kabafash|kabafash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabafash|shabafash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabafash|goshabafash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabafash|gokishabafash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabafashnﾃｼ|shabafashnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabafashnknﾃｼ|goshabafashnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabafashnﾃｼ|gokishabafashnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabafashshﾃｫ|shabafashshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabafashnkshﾃｫ|goshabafashnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabafashshﾃｫ|gokishabafashshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabafashro|shabafashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabafashnkro|goshabafashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabafashro|gokishabafashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabafashmu|shabafashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabafashnkmu|goshabafashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabafashmu|gokishabafashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabafashsher|shabafashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabafashnksher|goshabafashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabafashsher|gokishabafashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabafashng|shabafashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabafashnkng|goshabafashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabafashng|gokishabafashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabafashya|shabafashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabafashnkya|goshabafashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabafashya|gokishabafashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabafashyam|shabafashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabafashnkyam|goshabafashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabafashyam|gokishabafashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabafashnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shabafashnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabafashnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshabafashnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabafashnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishabafashnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabafashnﾃｼro|shabafashnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabafashnknﾃｼro|goshabafashnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabafashnﾃｼro|gokishabafashnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabafashnﾃｼmu|shabafashnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabafashnknﾃｼmu|goshabafashnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabafashnﾃｼmu|gokishabafashnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabafashshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shabafashshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabafashnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshabafashnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabafashshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishabafashshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabafashshﾃｫro|shabafashshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabafashnkshﾃｫro|goshabafashnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabafashshﾃｫro|gokishabafashshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabafashshﾃｫmu|shabafashshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabafashnkshﾃｫmu|goshabafashnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabafashshﾃｫmu|gokishabafashshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabafashronﾃｼ|shabafashronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabafashnkronﾃｼ|goshabafashnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabafashronﾃｼ|gokishabafashronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabafashroshﾃｫ|shabafashroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabafashnkroshﾃｫ|goshabafashnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabafashroshﾃｫ|gokishabafashroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabafashromu|shabafashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabafashnkromu|goshabafashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabafashromu|gokishabafashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabafashmunﾃｼ|shabafashmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabafashnkmunﾃｼ|goshabafashnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabafashmunﾃｼ|gokishabafashmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabafashmushﾃｫ|shabafashmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabafashnkmushﾃｫ|goshabafashnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabafashmushﾃｫ|gokishabafashmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabafashmuro|shabafashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabafashnkmuro|goshabafashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabafashmuro|gokishabafashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
